name: mah
description: Expose Meta Agents Harness operational tools inside Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect active crew context and delegate through MAH.
interface.longDescription: Adds native Codex tools for active crew inspection, route discovery, and bounded MAH-driven delegation.
defaultPrompt: Show the active MAH crew context.
List the valid delegation targets from this agent.
Delegate a bounded task through the MAH graph.
